This article details the [[Leeds Rhinos]] rugby league football club's 2016 season. This was the Leeds Rhinos' 21st season in the [[Super League]]. Leeds Rhinos were the reigning winners of the [[Super League Grand Final]], [[League Leader's Shield|Super League Leaders' Shield]] and the [[Challenge Cup]], after they became only the third team in the Super League era to win the treble in 2015.

Leeds Rhinos finished in 9th position after 23 rounds, their lowest finish since 1996, before demotion to [[The Qualifiers]]. Leeds Rhinos then finished 1st in The Qualifiers, winning six of their seven matches, to maintain their Super League status for [[Super League XXII|the 2017 season]].

==Players==
